# clear — Clear _(HTML/CSS)_

```css
@forward '@lucca-front/scss/src/components/clear';
```

```html
<span class="clear${…}${…}${…}" ${…} role="button" disabled="disabled">
	<span class="pr-u-mask">${…}</span>
</span>
```

```html
<a href="#" (click)="$event.preventDefault()" class="clear${…}${…}${…}" ${…}>
	<span class="pr-u-mask">${…}</span>
</a>
```

```html
<button class="clear${…}${…}${…}" ${…}>
	<span class="pr-u-mask">${…}</span>
</button>
```
